resources.name: SCEP SPEC-009 Domain Events Acceptance
resources.description: Domain Events acceptance. Run the automated folder in numeric order, then use the optional No-Show folder for the time-dependent seventh contract.

resources.name: SPEC-009 Automated Domain Events
resources.description: Run all requests in numeric order. Validates six event contracts, telemetry duplicate prevention, read-only API authorization, documented filters, deterministic detail, OpenAPI and metrics.

resources.name: 01 - Login Administrator and Initialize Run
02 - Create Facility
03 - Create Station and Connector
04 - Create EV Driver
resources.afterResponseScript: insomnia.test('driver creation returns 201', () => insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(201));

resources.name: 05 - Login EV Driver
06 - Create Vehicle
07 - Publish ReservationCreated
08 - Read ReservationCreated with Documented Filters
09 - Reject Unauthenticated Event Read
resources.afterResponseScript: insomnia.test('missing bearer authentication returns 401', () => insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(401));

resources.name: 10 - Reject Non-Administrator Event Read
resources.afterResponseScript: insomnia.test('EV Driver receives 403', () => insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(403));

resources.name: 11 - Publish ReservationRescheduled
resources.afterResponseScript: insomnia.test('reschedule returns 200', () => insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(200));

resources.name: 12 - Verify ReservationRescheduled and Deterministic Ordering
resources.afterResponseScript:
const body = insomnia.response.json();
insomnia.test('created and rescheduled events use deterministic newest-first order', () => { insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(200); insomnia.expect(body).to.have.length(2); insomnia.expect(body[0].event_type).to.eql('reservation.rescheduled'); insomnia.expect(body[1].event_type).to.eql('reservation.created'); insomnia.expect(body.every(item => item.event_version === 1)).to.eql(true); });

resources.name: 13 - Create Near-Term Reservation for Charging Session
14 - Publish ChargingSessionStarted
15 - Publish TelemetrySampleReceived
16 - Retry Telemetry Without Duplicate Event
17 - Verify Exactly One Telemetry Event
resources.afterResponseScript:
const body = insomnia.response.json();
insomnia.test('duplicate ingestion produced exactly one event', () => { insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(200); insomnia.expect(body).to.have.length(1); insomnia.expect(body[0].event_version).to.eql(1); insomnia.expect(body[0].payload.sample_id).to.eql('spec009-' + insomnia.baseEnvironment.get('run_id')); });

resources.name: 18 - Publish ChargingSessionCompleted
resources.afterResponseScript:
const body = insomnia.response.json();
insomnia.test('completion returns 200 and COMPLETED', () => { insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(200); insomnia.expect(body.status).to.eql('COMPLETED'); });

resources.name: 19 - Verify Both Charging Session Events
20 - Create Reservation for Cancellation
21 - Publish ReservationCancelled
resources.afterResponseScript:
const body = insomnia.response.json();
insomnia.test('cancellation returns 200 and CANCELLED', () => { insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(200); insomnia.expect(body.reservation.status).to.eql('CANCELLED'); });

resources.name: 22 - Verify ReservationCancelled V1
resources.afterResponseScript:
const body = insomnia.response.json();
insomnia.test('one standard cancellation event exists', () => { insomnia.expect(body).to.have.length(1); insomnia.expect(body[0].event_version).to.eql(1); insomnia.expect(body[0].payload).to.eql({ cancellation_type: 'STANDARD' }); });

resources.name: 23 - Read Immutable Event Detail
resources.afterResponseScript:
const body = insomnia.response.json();
insomnia.test('event detail returns canonical immutable event', () => { insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(200); insomnia.expect(body.id).to.eql(insomnia.baseEnvironment.get('created_event_id')); insomnia.expect(body.event_type).to.eql('reservation.created'); });

resources.name: 24 - Exercise Consumer and Delivery Status Filters
resources.afterResponseScript:
const body = insomnia.response.json();
insomnia.test('delivery filters are accepted and return no false matches', () => { insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(200); insomnia.expect(body).to.eql([]); });

resources.name: 25 - Verify Read-Only OpenAPI Contract
26 - Verify Domain Event Metrics
resources.afterResponseScript:
const text = insomnia.response.text();
insomnia.test('SPEC-009 Prometheus metrics are exposed', () => { ['domain_events_persisted_total','domain_event_deliveries_total','domain_event_delivery_retries_total','domain_event_delivery_failures_total','domain_event_pending_deliveries','domain_event_registered_consumers'].forEach(name => insomnia.expect(text).to.include(name)); });

resources.name: SPEC-009 Optional Manual No-Show
resources.description: Run after the automated folder with a fresh run. Execute 01, wait until no_show_start_at + 15 minutes, execute 02 to trigger reconciliation, then execute 03. Refresh the driver/admin tokens if they expire.

resources.name: 01 - Create Near-Term Reservation
02 - Reconcile After 15-Minute Grace Period
resources.description: Wait until no_show_start_at + 15 minutes before executing this request.
resources.afterResponseScript:
const body = insomnia.response.json();
insomnia.test('reservation is reconciled to NO_SHOW', () => { insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(200); insomnia.expect(body.status).to.eql('NO_SHOW'); insomnia.expect(body.no_show_at).to.be.a('string'); });

resources.name: 03 - Verify ReservationMarkedNoShow V1
resources.afterResponseScript:
const body = insomnia.response.json();
insomnia.test('one ReservationMarkedNoShow V1 exists', () => { insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(200); insomnia.expect(body).to.have.length(1); insomnia.expect(body[0].event_version).to.eql(1); });
